examples: Does the college cafeteria provide a healthful diet?
In January of last year the Moviemania chain of movie theaters started propping its popcorn in canola oil, instead of the less healthful coconut oil that it had been using until then.
At the same time there's more competition from chains like Subway, which offers more healthful fare.
But if Green happens to be a by-product of eating healthful food, all the better.
